name: Olive Garden Pasta Roma Soup
recipeIngredient: Canned tomatoes, drained and diced (1 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the garbanzo beans in a food processor until well mashed. Scrape down the sides as necessary and reserve.
2. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add carrots, onions, celery, and garlic. Sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (except pasta) to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer and stir occasionally for 20 minutes.
4. Keep the soup warm. Add cooked pasta and serve immediately.
